mechanics.excerpt: Until the Star League demise were headed In the right direction_ The fusion reactor and the KF drive allowed us t0 conquer the stars_ Terraforming enabled us conquer Mother Nature_ Advancing medical technology allowed uS conquer disease after disease We had not. nowever, conquered human: most primal tlaws ealousy and greed_ The Succession Wars that raged for almost two and half centures nearly dragged the human race back to the Stone Age.
